TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fudafudak, title = Fudafudak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fudafudak} }

S.FORM: alang Fudafudak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 152 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 10 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 142 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga Dikidiki. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Fudafudak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Fudafudak ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 152 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 10 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 142 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 3%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fudafudak hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Fudafudak hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Fudafudak hya' ga Dikidiki. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Fudafudak ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *u*a*u*ak ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *u*a*u*ak ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na *u*a*u*ak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *u*a*u*ak ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *u*a*u*ak ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na *u*a*u*ak ħjaʔ ɣa *iki*iki. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *u*a*u*ak ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
